use std::sync::{Arc, Mutex};

struct Service {
    db: Arc<Mutex<Option<DbConnection>>>,
    cache: Arc<Mutex<Option<CacheHandle>>>,
    ready: Arc<Mutex<bool>>,
}

impl Service {
    fn new() -> Self {
        Self {
            db: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
            cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
            ready: Arc::new(Mutex::new(false)),
        }
    }

    fn connect(&self) {
        let conn = DbConnection::connect("localhost");
        *self.db.lock().unwrap() = Some(conn);
        *self.ready.lock().unwrap() = true;
    }

    fn is_ready(&self) -> bool {
        *self.ready.lock().unwrap()
    }

    fn query(&self, sql: &str) -> Option<String> {
        let guard = self.db.lock().unwrap();
        guard.as_ref().map(|db| db.execute(sql))
    }
}

struct DbConnection;
impl DbConnection {
    fn connect(_addr: &str) -> Self { Self }
    fn execute(&self, _sql: &str) -> String { todo!() }
}

struct CacheHandle;
